task_completion.description: Divide the floor plan into four distinct zones using partition walls and name each room.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 2D floor plan shows new interior walls creating four enclosed areas. Text labels defining the rooms (e.g., 'Testing Lab', 'Proctor Room', 'Check-in', 'Break Room') are visible on the plan.

task_completion.description: Furnish the Testing Lab with at least 12 desks and 12 chairs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 2D plan or 3D view of the Testing Lab zone, there are at least 12 desk objects and 12 chair objects placed.

task_completion.description: Furnish the Check-in area and Break Room with their required specific items.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Check-in area contains a reception desk, at least 4 chairs, and at least 4 shelving/locker units. The Break Room contains at least 1 table, 2 chairs, and 2 appliances (e.g., refrigerator, microwave, coffee maker).

task_completion.description: Install at least 4 doors or interior observation windows.
task_completion.visual_evidence: At least 4 door or window objects are placed within the newly created interior partition walls, connecting the zones (e.g., between the Proctor Room and Testing Lab).

task_completion.description: Apply distinct floor colors or textures to at least two rooms and include at least two dimension lines.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D view shows at least two rooms with different floor colors or textures. The 2D plan displays at least two dimension lines (lines with measurement values indicating length/width).

integrity.description: The agent used the Sweet Home 3D graphical interface to design the floor plan.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Sweet Home 3D application window open with the 2D plan and 3D view, rather than a terminal or text editor modifying the .sh3d file directly.

integrity.description: Furniture and walls are genuinely placed within the application's workspace.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 3D view and 2D plan show actual 3D models and standard Sweet Home 3D wall/room elements from the catalog, not pasted images or external mockups.

integrity.description: The agent built upon the provided empty commercial shell.
integrity.visual_evidence: The outer shell and exterior walls of the building match the original empty villa layout, with only interior modifications (walls, furniture, colors) added.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating 4 named rooms using partition walls in Sweet Home 3D. The Testing Lab needs >=12 desks and >=12 chairs. The Check-in area needs a reception desk, >=4 chairs, and >=4 shelving units. The Break Room needs >=1 table, >=2 chairs, and >=2 appliances. There must be >=4 doors/interior windows, distinct floor colors/textures in >=2 rooms, and >=2 dimension lines on the 2D plan.
